# QuickLinq

> Send Quotes. Win Jobs. Get Paid. The all-in-one platform for service businesses to manage clients, quotes, invoices, scheduling, and payments.

## Pages

- [Home](/landing): Product overview, features, pricing, and testimonials for QuickLinq.
- [Features](/features): Detailed walkthrough of every QuickLinq capability — quotes, jobs, pipeline, reviews, AI assistant, payments, and more.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Walkthrough of QuickLinq's four-step workflow — quotes, jobs, invoices, and payments.
